entities.name: positions.py
entities.context: CLI script at N5/scripts/positions.py for managing V's positions database — supports list, audit, check-overlap, and suggest-connections commands

entities.name: Positions Database
entities.context: A curated knowledge store where V's beliefs and insights are recorded with mandatory evidence pointers and inter-position connections

entities.name: N5
entities.context: V's personal operating system / infrastructure layer housed under /home/workspace/N5

entities.name: Evidence Pointers
entities.context: Mandatory references (e.g. conversation:con_XXX) attached to every position to ensure traceability

entities.name: Connections
entities.context: Links between positions discovered via suggest-connections; at least one should be added after creating a new position

entities.name: check-overlap
entities.context: Sub-command of positions.py that checks semantic overlap before creating a new position, using a similarity threshold (default 0.4)

entities.name: suggest-connections
entities.context: Sub-command of positions.py that recommends links between a new position and existing ones

entities.name: Quality over Quantity
entities.context: Guiding principle: one well-articulated position is preferred over multiple vague ones; the database should grow slowly

entities.name: Source Conversation Tracking
entities.context: Practice of always passing --source-conversation so every position can be traced back to its originating conversation

relationships.context: positions.py is the CLI interface for reading, writing, auditing, and connecting entries in the Positions Database
Every position in the database must have at least one evidence pointer; creation without evidence is forbidden
Positions are linked to each other via connections suggested after creation
suggest-connections command discovers and proposes inter-position links
check-overlap queries existing positions to prevent semantic duplication before a new entry is added
positions.py lives inside the N5 scripts directory as part of V's personal infrastructure
The database's growth philosophy: prefer fewer, well-articulated positions over many vague ones
All positions must record their source conversation for full provenance tracing
